name_cn:
Suede
GABY MINI Box Bag
The adorable new arrival for the upcoming spring and summer season~ Roseanne Park's matching makeup bag/box bag, featuring suede + unique stitching craftsmanship, double zipper design for easy opening, small body with large capacity, detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody, also serves as a makeup bag, exquisite and practical, the latest bestseller, well-deserved.
Style: 766731
Size: 18x11x6.5cm
